flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wabash College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.9k → $50.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Wabash College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (78.7% → 70.8%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wabash College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
